name: SmartYT Media
description: URL media sniffer for downloading video or audio and extracting transcript text through subtitles or local speech tooling.

capabilities.title: Sniff URL media
capabilities.description: Inspect a URL and return structured media metadata such as title, platform, duration, thumbnail, extension, and available formats.
examples: Sniff media information from this video link

capabilities.title: Download URL media
capabilities.description: Queue a video, audio, or combined media download for a URL using yt-dlp and ffmpeg.
examples: Download the video from this link

capabilities.title: Download media and return files
capabilities.description: Download URL media immediately for multi-Gear workflows and return completed local artifact paths.
examples: Download this video and give me the local file path
Fetch this media file now so it can be imported into the media library

capabilities.title: Convert media to text
capabilities.description: Queue transcript extraction for a URL. The gear first tries platform subtitles, then falls back to local Whisper tooling when available.
examples: Convert this video URL to text
Transcribe the audio from this link
